meaning: n.头衔,名称,标题,冠军,资格,字幕,权利,扉页vt.赋予头衔,加标题于adj.标题的,用作书名的
examples: The title is printed in italics.
He was disgraced and stripped of his title.
"I'm really relieved that it is over more than anything, " said the new world title holder.
I've written a few thousand words and the working title is The Friends of Harry Perkins.
